location: Dropped after defeating both Valiant Gargoyles in the Siofra Aqueduct, at the northern end of the underground Siofra River area beneath Nokron, Eternal City.
tactics: From the Mimic Tear grace in Nokron, follow the long stone bridge, drop onto land via a broken section on the left, then head north past a cluster of Spirit Jellyfish and down through a tunnel into the Aqueduct.
This is a dual-boss fight: a Greatsword-and-Halberd Gargoyle starts it, and a second Great Axe-and-Twinblade Gargoyle joins from a waterfall once the first drops below half health.
The Gargoyle's Twinblade drops from the second gargoyle — expect to need repeat kills if you want both weapons.
After the fight, a transportation coffin at the back of the room leads onward to Deeproot Depths.
lore: A bronze greatsword wielded by the Valiant Gargoyles, its missing pieces mended with corpse wax like its wielder — a patchwork blade built from the remains of fallen champions.

builds.name: Pure Strength Build
builds.why: C-rank Strength scaling, its best stat by a wide margin, plus heavy poise-breaking swings make it a straightforward pure-Strength greatsword.

builds.name: Heavy Two-Hander for Poise Break
builds.why: High base physical damage and slow, weighty swings excel at breaking enemy stance, especially two-handed for the Strength bonus.
